feed.title: Minchin.ca - Comments: Day 4: Provo UT to Las Vegas NV

entry.title: Posted by: Jerry
entry.summary: PS. A lot of that traffic that you’re wondering about is all headed to and from California. I think you’d be amazed at how much of the population of California travels up North to Utah (but then again a lot of it stops in Nevada), but there’s …
entry.content: PS. A lot of that traffic that you’re wondering about is all headed to and from California. I think you’d be amazed at how much of the population of California travels up North to Utah (but then again a lot of it stops in Nevada), but there’s constant traffic. Look at the plates…lots are Cali plates I bet.
